headline: Kore.ai Launches Agent Management Platform to Bring Governance and Control to Enterprise AI
summary: ORLANDO, Fla., March 17, 2026--Kore.ai, a provider of agentic applications and a market-leading enterprise AI platform, today announced the launch of its Agent Management Platform, a unified command center designed to govern, monitor, and manage AI agents and AI systems across the enterprise.

headline: Assisted Tax Preparation Aids H&R Block Amid Seasonality Trap
summary: HRB rides on strong tax preparation demand and digital growth, but seasonality, rising competition and declining efficiency metrics cloud its outlook.

headline: Vena Recognized as a Niche Player in the 2026 Gartner® Magic Quadrant™ for Financial Close and Consolidation Solutions
summary: TORONTO, March 17, 2026--Vena Solutions has been named a Niche Player in the 2026 Gartner Magic Quadrant for Financial Close and Consolidation Solutions.

raw.headline: Vena Recognized as a Niche Player in the 2026 Gartner® Magic Quadrant™ for Financial Close and Consolidation Solutions

headline: Gartner Puts AI Trust Research At Center Of Investor Debate
summary: Gartner released new survey findings indicating that about half of U.S. consumers prefer brands that do not use generative AI in customer-facing content. The company also issued recommendations for marketers to make AI use transparent, optional, and clearly beneficial in order to build trust. The survey and guidance highlight a growing gap between corporate adoption of generative AI tools and consumer comfort with AI-driven brand interactions. Gartner (NYSE:IT) is putting its own research...
